summary: Frontend-only testing of new ecosystem features: /p/:slug public profile, /r/:slug review link with smart-routing, and animated Ecosystem diagram on /lp. All 16 assertions across 8 testing groups passed. UI flows fully working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Ecosystem.jsx: clickable nodes use target='_blank' for internal routes (/, /p/:slug, /r/:slug). Spec allows this, but consider whether internal /portal links should stay in same tab for better UX continuity.

ReviewLink.jsx: when rating>=4 but user picks a non-Tuoma service (Google/FB/Booking), the flow just shows the 'done' card without actually redirecting to the external site. Acceptable for demo, but the 'done' copy says 'Otwórz {svc} i wklej swoją opinię tam' — UX could be improved with a real outbound link.

PublicProfile.jsx: filters out reviews with manager_message (so manager-replied reviews are hidden). This logic seems inverted — usually owner-replied reviews are kept for credibility. Worth confirming product intent.
All required data-testid attributes present and tests robust.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new ecosystem features (/p, /r, /lp ecosystem) are functional and visually correct. The smart-routing logic for low ratings (≤3★) correctly limits public services and pushes Tuoma intercept. POST /api/waitlist is fired on tuoma click in negative flow. Backend was previously validated in iteration_1/2 and was not retested per request. No retest needed unless new changes are introduced.
